title: Protocol Sync
story: [Meridian-7 Log #017] rEx replied with a set of key-value pair data — this is its information exchange format. key=value, where key consists of lowercase letters, and value is either a number or a quoted string. You need to parse each pair accurately to understand the parameters rEx sent.
promptChallenge: Write a prompt to have AI generate a regex that matches key=value pairs (key is lowercase letters, value is a number or quoted string)
hints: [Hint] key consists only of lowercase letters (no underscores, no digits)
[Hint] value is either pure digits or a quoted string
[Hint] Use grouping and alternation to handle the two value formats
promptHints: Describe the rules for key and value step by step
Tell the AI that value has two possible formats

feedback.onPass: [Pattern Accepted] Key-value protocol synced. Data transmission format mastered.
feedback.onFail: [Parse Failed] Protocol mismatch. You need to handle both value formats simultaneously.
feedback.onPerfect: [Decryption Success] Protocol perfectly synced. A precise combination of grouping and alternation.
feedback.onDirectWrite: [Manual Override] Manual protocol sync. Combining rules is second nature to you.
